response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience, but lacks proven leadership in IT architecture and team management at an executive level, and his German proficiency is only basic — a hard requirement for the role. His project leadership is entrepreneurial rather than corporate, and UML/architecture documentation skills are not demonstrated.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions with real-world impact (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Extensive full-stack experience across languages, platforms, and domains (DLang, Node, Linux, embedded)
Proven ability to lead technical projects independently and mentor via workshops and open-source collaboration
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting the C1 requirement
No clear evidence of formal IT architecture design, UML modeling, or client-facing technical advisory experience
Leadership experience is primarily technical contributor or founder, not as a manager of interdisciplinary consulting teams
